metadata.description: Cloud Market — Professional Odoo development plugins for Claude Code. Each plugin uses 1 unified command + skill-driven natural language.

plugins.name: odoo-upgrade
plugins.description: Comprehensive Odoo module upgrade assistant (14-19). Pure skill-driven — no commands needed. Handles XML, Python, JS, SCSS, and data migrations.

plugins.name: odoo-frontend
plugins.description: Odoo frontend toolkit — 1 command (/odoo-frontend) with create-theme sub-command. Theme development, Figma extraction, PWA, publicWidget, OWL migration.

plugins.name: odoo-report
plugins.description: Odoo email templates & QWeb reports — create, validate, migrate, and debug across Odoo 14-19. Pure skill-driven, no commands needed.

plugins.name: odoo-test
plugins.description: Odoo testing toolkit — 1 command (/odoo-test) with generate, data, run, coverage, e2e sub-commands. All also available via natural language.

plugins.name: odoo-security
plugins.description: Odoo security auditor — 1 command (/odoo-security) with --layer and --severity flags. Access rules, routes, sudo, SQL injection scanning.

plugins.name: odoo-i18n
plugins.description: Odoo i18n toolkit — 1 command (/odoo-i18n) with extract, validate, missing, export sub-commands. Arabic/RTL support.

plugins.name: odoo-service
plugins.description: Odoo server lifecycle — 1 command (/odoo-service) with start, stop, init, db, docker, ide, scaffold, ready sub-commands. VSCode + PyCharm config generation.

plugins.name: odoo-docker
plugins.description: Docker infrastructure for Odoo — 1 command (/odoo-docker) with init, compose, deploy, build sub-commands. Nginx, debugging, performance via natural language.
